change: Added Gamemode Folder Scope restriction under new Folder-Specific Scopes parent section to control file type access in gamemodes/ directory
notes: Allows .scar, .md, .csv, .xml editing; blocks binary/build artifacts (.bin, .pdn, .png, .rdo, .aoe4mod, .burnproj, .locdb). Restructured Rule Precedence tier 2 to encompass both mods/ and gamemodes/. Updated metadata date to 2026-03-01.

change: Added three quality-improvement sections: Pre-Response Validation checklist, Context Budget Guidance, and Anti-Patterns table
notes: Pre-Response Validation provides 7-point checklist for AI self-correction. Context Budget Guidance establishes 150K token limit with reading priority heuristics. Anti-Patterns table documents 10 common mistakes to avoid. Total additions: +35 lines. Implements recommendations from SKILL_instructions_gen.md analysis.

change: Refactored master file from 586 lines (22K chars) to 105 lines (3997 chars) for GitHub 4K Code Review compliance. Migrated SCAR standards, PS standards, folder scopes, and mod indexes to 5 path-specific instruction files. Removed copilot-skills registry references.

Created 5 path-specific instruction files: scar-coding (3899 chars), ps-coding (2724 chars), mods-scope (1088 chars), gamemode-scope (836 chars), mod-context (2129 chars). Each file uses YAML frontmatter with applyTo glob patterns per GitHub native architecture. Total: 14673 chars across 6 files, all under 4K limit.

Fixed English starter Keep incorrectly counting toward production building limit. Root cause: English keep is dual-classified (military_only_production + scar_keep) and startup reconciliation counted it as a production building. Fix uses player.keep.entity from Mod_FindKeep() to identify the starter keep before any counter increments, excluding it from both production and workshop counts. OnEntityKilled early-returns for the tracked starter keep entity ID. Cross-verified: English is the only civ with keep+production dual classification.

Added starter keep tracking to Debug_GetBuildingLimitState() for English/Lancaster players (entity ID + alive state). Added new Debug_GetStarterKeepState() console command: shows tracked starter keep entity, alive state, current owner, live keep count, and counter consistency per English/Lancaster player.
